description: Golden vectors for crypto.LengthPrefixed per ADR-005 §2. Each vector pins the SHA-256 digest of the length-prefixed encoding of (DST, fields...). Any change to the encoding rule or to the digest values is a compatibility break.

vectors.name: pre_grant_canonical
vectors.description: Canonical PRE Grant SplitID case: grantor DID, recipient DID, and CID.Bytes() (algo byte 0x12 || SHA-256("artifact-content")).
